[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] '''Vitwroth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] executive officer who served in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he fought aboard the ''[[Mandian]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{1st}}
